sp_widget.name: Incentnow Assignment Page
sp_widget.template:
{{options.assign_page_title || 'Assign Quota'}}
{{options.form_heading || 'Assign Quota to Users'}}
{{options.form_sub || 'Select users and assign quota'}}
No quotas match "{{c.quotaSearch}}"
{{q.name}}
{{q.business_unit}} | {{q.financial_year}}
Filter Users
All of these conditions must be met
{{c.filteredUsers.length}} user{{c.filteredUsers.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}} match the filter No users match the filter conditions
{{user.name}} ({{user.quota}})
{{user.email}}
{{user.segment}}

{{c.getSelectedCount()}} users selected

⚠️
Sales Representatives are not allowed to assign or unassign.
